♟ Insert Chess Board

🎨 Board Editor

Set up any position. White pieces go on bottom by default. Right-click a square to remove a piece.

FEN:

📚 GM Games Library

Annotated master games. Click Open in Analysis to study any game — variations, comments, and annotations will load automatically.

⚠️ Heavily annotated games may take a moment to load. Some games with complex formatting may not load all moves — if this happens, try pasting the PGN directly into the Analysis board.

💡 Our Mission

♛

Chess for Everyone

Chess64 was built with a single mission: to make beautiful, feature-rich chess available to everyone, completely free. No paywalls. No ads. No accounts required. Just chess.

📚

Open & Free

Every feature is free. No premium tiers, no upgrade prompts. We believe chess education and tools should be accessible to all players regardless of budget.

🎓

Learn & Improve

From opening theory to endgame technique, our goal is to help every player improve — whether you're a complete beginner or an experienced tournament player.

🔥

Passion Project

Chess64 is built by chess enthusiasts, for chess enthusiasts. Every feature is designed with love for the game and respect for its 1,500-year history.

🚀

Always Improving

We constantly add features, fix bugs, and improve based on player feedback. Your suggestions directly shape Chess64's future.

🙏 Thanks & Attributions

Chess64 is made possible by these incredible open-source projects and APIs. Chess64 also uses ChessDB Cloud (chessdb.cn) for opening explorer analysis — please support this project:

⚡
Stockfish
The world's strongest open-source chess engine, used for analysis, AI opponents, and position evaluation.
👋
Lichess
Free and open-source chess for everyone. Chess64 uses Lichess's public broadcast API to display upcoming and live chess events on the Events page. Lichess is a non-profit and we love them for it.
♔
Chess.com
Player profiles, ratings, leaderboards, and game archives provided through the Chess.com public API.
📷
Wikimedia Commons / CBurnett
The beautiful chess piece images are the CBurnett piece set, released under Creative Commons license by Colin M.L. Burnett.
🌐
2700chess.com
Live top-player ratings banner displayed on the Notable Players page. A great resource for following elite chess.
🔥
Firebase / Google
Authentication, real-time database, and infrastructure powering all user accounts, online games, chat, community features, and cloud sync.
🎵
Apple / iTunes Search API
Song search and 30-second preview clips provided free via Apple's iTunes Search API, powering the Chess64 music player feature.
🌐
ChessDB Cloud Database — chessdb.cn
Open cloud opening database for live position analysis in the explorer.

💌 Support Chess64

The best way to support Chess64 is to share it with fellow chess players and send feedback!

Experience chess in breathtaking 3D with our dedicated platform — engineered for the full chess experience with beautiful boards, pieces, and immersive gameplay.

♟ Chess64 Terms of Service

Last updated: 2025

By creating an account or using Chess64, you agree to the following terms:

1. Account Use
Chess64 accounts are provided as a free service. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate any account at any time, for any reason, with or without notice. This includes abuse, harassment, cheating, or any behavior deemed harmful to the community.

2. No Warranties
Chess64 is provided "as is" without any warranty. We do not guarantee uninterrupted service, data preservation, or accuracy of any content.

3. Limitation of Liability
Chess64 and its operators are not responsible for any loss of data, progress, or damages arising from your use of this service. Your use of Chess64 is entirely at your own risk.

4. Content
You are responsible for all content you publish. We reserve the right to remove any content without notice.

5. Privacy
We collect minimal data (email, display name, game stats) solely to operate the service. We do not sell your data.

6. Changes
These terms may change at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance of revised terms.

By creating an account you confirm you are at least 13 years old and agree to these terms.

🎧 Current Playlist

😤 Tilted?

Take a break from chess. Come back calm and sharp.

🔒
Tilted? is currently disabled by an administrator.
🎮

Play a quick game

Super Mario Ultra Deluxe — a short, fun hobby game made to help you decompress. No pressure, no rating.

🧘

Take 5 deep breaths

Inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 4, exhale for 6. Repeat 5 times. Your heart rate drops, your focus returns.

🚶

Step away for 2 minutes

Stand up, walk around. Physical movement breaks the mental loop of tilt. Come back fresh.

📖

Review the last game

Instead of rage-clicking rematch, open the analysis board and understand why that move went wrong.

💬

Read a chess quote

Even world champions lose games. Perspective helps.

⏰

Set a "one more game" rule

Tilt multiplies. Decide now: after this next game you stop for today — win or lose. Discipline beats impulse.

🏃

Play City Dash

A fast-paced 3D running game. Dodge, jump, and sprint through neon corridors. Pure flow state.

🕹️

Super Mario Ultra Deluxe

Arrow keys / WASD to move, Space / Up / W to jump. F to shoot fireballs. Collect coins, stomp enemies, reach the flag!

⚠️ This is an unofficial hobby project — not affiliated with or intended to compete with Nintendo's Mario franchise. Please support the official Mario games by Nintendo!

📱 Note: This game is designed for desktop keyboards and may not work well on mobile devices.

Arrow keys / WASD + Space to play · F to shoot · ⚠️ Desktop recommended

COINS: 0/100
LIVES: 3

📖 City Dash Manual

🎮 Controls

← → Arrow / A D — Dodge between lanes

↑ / Space / W — Jump

Double-tap Jump — Double jump (if enabled)

On-screen buttons — ◀ ▲ ▶ (toggle in settings)

🏆 Scoring

Distance — Score increases as you run further

Gold coins ● — +5 points each. Magnet pulls them in!

Speed multiplier — Shown as 1.0x, 1.5x, 2.0x etc next to score

Hi Score & Hi Speed — Saved locally across sessions

⚡ Power-Ups

🛡 Shield — Absorbs one obstacle hit (5 sec)

🧲 Magnet — Attracts coins from a distance (7 sec)

⚡ Boost — 1.7× speed burst (5 sec)

🚧 Obstacles

Hit an obstacle and it's game over (unless shielded).

City: Buses, Barriers, Crates

Neon: Pillars, Walls, Plasma Balls

Space: Asteroids, Cubes, Rings

Retro: Barrels, Fences, Spikes

⚙ Settings

Jump Mode — Single or Double jump

Obstacles — Normal / Intense (2× spawns) / Super Intense 💀 (3×)

Scenery — City / Sunset / Rainy Night / Neon District

🏗 Bars — Toggle the overhead track arches

🌉 Zones — Enables tunnels & bridges every ~400m

🌫 Fog — Dense fog in tunnels (harder!)

🎮 Buttons — Show/hide on-screen D-pad

🌆 Zones (when enabled)

Every 400m the environment changes. Pattern repeats:

🏙 City (0-400m) — Normal streets

🏙 City (400-800m) — New buildings

🚇 Tunnel (800-1200m) — Dark arches, neon lighting. Fog toggle makes this harder.

🌉 Bridge (1200-1600m) — Open sky, cable-stayed bridge, water below

Then repeats. Zones only active when 🌉 Zones is set to On.

Tip: Play in landscape on mobile for best experience. Speed increases the longer you survive!

♟ Chess64 3D

Experience chess like never before.

♟

Chess64's Premium 3D Chess Set

Enjoy Chess64's meticulously crafted 3D chess experience. Every piece was designed to feel satisfying — the perfect glare catches the board's surface as you rotate the camera, and the subtle click of a piece landing on the board is engineered to feel deliberate and precise. The board itself has a premium depth to it: rich textures, soft ambient lighting, and the kind of weight you'd expect from an over-the-board set. This isn't just chess — it's chess that feels good.

🖱 Drag to rotate · Scroll to zoom · Click piece then square to move

✨

Premium Glare

Specular highlights react to lighting as you rotate, giving the board a satisfying sheen.

🔊

Piece Sound Design

A satisfying thunk crafted to feel weighted and deliberate — like a real wooden set.

🎥

Free Camera

Orbit freely. Multiple boards, piece styles, glare colors, and backgrounds.
